title: neobartlettia sordida
intro: Neobartlettia sordida is a plant species, also known as Yellow Marigold, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, derived from its essential oils and compounds. The health benefits of Neobartlettia sordida include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
